# Version Update — Average-User Substance Upgrade

Date: 2026-06-28  
Suggested version label: `2026-06-28-average-user-substance`

## Summary

Expanded the Tri-County Regional Marketing Guide so average users can act from four practical perspectives:

- Artist
- Entrepreneur
- Events organizer
- Nonprofit board member

The update adds task-based guidance, worked examples, search recipes, event timelines, nonprofit proof tracking, and copy-ready outreach templates.

## Changed Files

- `index.html`
- `plan/index.html`
- `network/index.html`
- `amplifiers/index.html`
- `posting/index.html`
- `templates/index.html`
- `submit/index.html`
- `local-music-arts/index.html`
- `artist-gallery-promotion/index.html`
- `assets/styles.css`
- `docs/AVERAGE_USER_SUBSTANCE_UPGRADE_2026-06-28.md`
- `docs/VERSION_UPDATES_AVERAGE_USER_SUBSTANCE_2026-06-28.md`

## User-Facing Additions

### Homepage

Added persona path cards for:

- Artists
- Businesses
- Event organizers
- Nonprofit board members

### Plan

Added worked examples and nonprofit proof loop.

### Network

Added goal-based search recipes and next-step handling after finding a listing.

### Amplifiers

Added event promotion timeline, paid-placement decision checks, and event-type route table.

### Posting

Added event-type routing table.

### Templates

Added practical outreach templates for artists, galleries, live music, business launches, nonprofit program listings, and sponsor/partner documentation.

### Submit

Added examples of useful submissions.

### Local Music & Arts

Added a creative work loop explaining how the page can lead to bookings, collaborations, and repeatable outreach.

### Artist & Gallery Promotion

Added a plain-language section showing how the page can lead to commissions, shows, workshops, retail placement, and public programs.

## Deployment Notes

This remains a static site. No build command is required for Netlify drag-and-drop deployment.

Recommended Netlify settings:

- Build command: blank
- Publish directory: `.`
